content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Risk-off tape: Nifty -1.23%, Bank Nifty -1.54%, PSU Bank -2.11%, Realty -2.38%, VIX +11.88% to 18.84. IT and Pharma relatively defensive. With VIX spiking and most sectors red, focus is on managing existing book (trail SLs on winners, respect SLs on losers) rather than fresh aggressive entries. Book is already 65% deployed across 15 positions.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1055.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.4% winner. Current SL 1075 is ABOVE CMP 1077 by only 0.2% — self-stopout risk per Rule trail-gap discipline. Loosening slightly to 1055 (1% below CMP 1077, ~7% above entry 984) to lock in solid gains while giving room for normal noise. Wait — SL can only be TIGHTENED for longs. Current SL 1075 > new 1055 would be loosening = REJECTED. Reverting: hold SL at 1075 is too tight (above CMP). Correction: emit HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1075 sits 0.2% below CMP 1077 — very tight but on correct side. Q4 PAT +19% YoY, EPS beat 13.89%, BULLISH research +0.10. Cannot loosen SL (Rule violation). If stopped at 1075, lock in +9.3% gain — acceptable outcome. Hold to either SL fire or target 1135."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.2% within SL band. VIX spike +11.88% supports gold as safe haven. SL 121 is 2.2% below CMP 123.57 — appropriate buffer. Hold to either SL or target 135."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Current SL already at 825 (above entry 820, breakeven+). No change — this would be a no-op MODIFY. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.8%. SL 825 already at breakeven+. CMP 834.85, SL 825 = 1.2% gap, within trail-gap floor. FMCG strength today (HUL +4.7%, NEST +2.2%), Q4 beat (+22% rev YoY), BULLISH +0.12. Hold for target 855."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1356.71,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op check: current SL already 1356.71, target 1420 — emitting same values is wasted signal. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.5% winner. SL 1356.71 sits 1.6% below CMP 1380 — within trail-gap floor and tight enough. Cannot tighten further without breaching the 1% floor. Q4 beat (boosted by one-time tax), IT sector defensive today (+1.4% TECHM). Hold for target 1420 (just 2.9% away)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.6%, CMP 2997 sitting near SL 3000. Per Rule 17 pre-SL discipline: do NOT front-run the SL. SL was placed at 3000 (-0.8% from entry 3025) — let it work. Defence cluster fundamentals intact (Rs 33,000 Cr corvette L1, BULLISH +0.10). If SL fires, accept it; do not preempt."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.7%. SL 820 sits below CMP 827.45 by 0.9% — just under trail-gap floor but already at breakeven+. Cannot loosen (Rule). Q4 record revenue/PAT, BULLISH +0.05. Hold to target 875."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.9%, CMP 1445.90 vs SL 1465. Wait — CMP 1445.90 is BELOW SL 1465?? Stored SL appears looser than CMP. Re-checking: entry 1490, SL 1465 (-1.7% from entry). CMP 1445.90 is below SL 1465 — SL should have already triggered. Possibly stale tick; engine will handle. Hold and let SL execute naturally. Q4 PAT +36.6%, fundamentals intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Breakeven. SL 1580 sits 2.7% below CMP 1624.90. Research flagged NEUTRAL with governance signals (SMP designations, QIP extension). Hold to SL or trail later if it pushes higher. Zaynich USFDA decision mid-2026 is the binary catalyst."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat. SL 2755 sits 1.0% below CMP 2783 — exactly at trail-gap floor. Q4 PAT +47% FY26, BULLISH +0.08, fluorochemicals tailwind. Hold for target 2920."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.3%. SL 9020 sits 0.6% below CMP 9075 — under trail-gap floor but cannot loosen. Q4 record revenue, 52w high today, multiple broker upgrades to Rs 10,500. If SL fires on noise, accept it. Otherwise let it run to 9550."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 25,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "POST-ENTRY NEW INFORMATION justifying exit (Rule 15 satisfied): Research surfaced Q4 PAT DECLINED -17.4% YoY, EPS missed by 18%, multiple brokerage DOWNGRADES (UBS SELL, Citi SELL Rs 1060, Nuvama -17% downside flag, MOFSL Neutral Rs 1835). Consensus target Rs 1751 vs CMP 1984 = ~12% downside. 32% US export exposure during soft US auto cycle. This is a BEARISH research read (-0.12 modifier), not intraday wobble. Thesis at entry (defence forging tailwind, accumulation volume) is invalidated by fundamental Q4 print + analyst downgrade cluster. Exit at -1.5% (better than SL 1955 = -3%)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-3.1%, CMP 356.80 vs SL 354 (0.8% buffer). Per Rule 17: do not front-run SL. Q4 PAT +30.6%, Macquarie target 415, BULLISH +0.10. Let SL work if it fires."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.8%. SL 10440 sits 1.5% below CMP 10598 — appropriate buffer. Q4 PAT +103%, buyback at Rs 12,000 provides floor, Rs 150 dividend. BULLISH +0.13. Auto sector weak today (-1.6%) but Bajaj-specific catalysts strong. Hold for target 11260."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.1%, SL 472 sits 1.0% below CMP 481.65 — at trail-gap floor. Q4 PAT +16%, guidance upgraded to low double-digit growth, BULLISH +0.10. FMCG defensive theme today. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.4%. SL 1226 = entry (breakeven). CMP 1242.60, SL 1226 = 1.3% gap. Cannot tighten without crossing trail-gap floor. New 52w high today in down tape — strong RS. Q4 results upcoming = binary event watch, but already at breakeven SL. Hold for target 1290."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1075 cannot be loosened; very tight (0.2% below CMP). If stopped, lock in +9.3%."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "VIX spike supports gold; within SL band."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL at breakeven+, FMCG strength."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL appropriately tight at 1.6% below CMP."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Pre-SL — let it work per Rule 17."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL at breakeven+, cannot loosen."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Apparent stale tick — SL should trigger on next valid quote."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Neutral research; SL provides buffer."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Specialty chem tailwind, SL at trail floor."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Tight SL; 52w high; cannot loosen."},
    {"symbol": "BHARATFORG", "current_action": "EXIT", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Post-entry bearish research: Q4 PAT -17%, brokerage SELL cluster — thesis invalidated."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Pre-SL; do not front-run."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Strong Q4, buyback floor at 12000."},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "FMCG defensive, guidance upgrade."},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL at breakeven; new 52w high."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Rule 18 admit-side walk: VIX +11.88% to 18.84, Nifty -1.23%, breadth strongly negative. This IS a risk-off tape with explicit macro justification — fresh BUYs into a VIX-spike day are not the default. Specific reject rationale for BULLISH watchlist candidates: (1) MARICO/COFORGE/POLYCAB/LAURUSLABS — already held, cannot stack. (2) THERMAX +14.6% gap-up — chase risk on Q4-reaction parabolic move, not entering after the move. (3) PERSISTENT — already 65% deployed, IT exposure covered by COFORGE. (4) TATACONSUM +6.96% — FMCG cluster already covered by MARICO+DABUR (~10% capital); cluster-cap concern. (5) BERGEPAINT — Q4 results May 12 = binary event within 1 session, Rule 11 disqualifies new entry. (6) NUVAMA +10.3% — gap chase, no thesis depth. (7) CGPOWER — capital goods cluster already covered by POLYCAB+GRSE+SRF, cluster concentration. (8) NBCC — fine setup but PSU realty/construction crowded today (Realty -2.38%). (9) SUNPHARMA/HCLTECH/INFY — defensive but unconvincing technicals. Book already 65% deployed with 15 positions; BHARATFORG exit will free ~5% capital. Will reassess afternoon if VIX retreats and breadth improves.",
  "portfolio_notes": "HFCL pending BUY order from prior session is now 5+ days stale (7505 minutes old) — should be cancelled but engine will likely auto-expire. Book heavy with 15 positions, 9 essentially at breakeven or tight SL. Risk-off day with VIX +12%: priority is defense, not offense. BHARATFORG exit is the one decisive action — research surfaced material post-entry negative facts (Q4 PAT decline, brokerage SELL cluster) that meet Rule 15 standard for same-session/early exit. Cumulative P&L -1859 across experiment; 5-day win rate 12% is weak — discipline (let SLs fire, don't overtrade) is the right read."
}
